content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the full broadcast and caption file; the benchmark retains only captions/metadata and preserves likeness/partner limitations.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the full-broadcast VTT as an official same-group asset. Private retention is provisional, limited to safe-rejection boundary validation, and remains subject to legal/policy review.

content_completeness.rationale: The official sidecar has a 105.763-second uncovered tail and no complete-transcript assertion; this row is sealed only as a cue-limit safe-rejection boundary.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: The >7,200-cue file is retained privately to verify truthful rejection; the 56.3 GB media is not downloaded.

third_party_caveats: Live-broadcast likeness and partner-insert rights require review before any media use.

version_equivalence.evidence: The first SVS 14415 media group explicitly identifies the full broadcast and co-locates its MP4, caption files, and official live-video YouTube link.
